A few years ago, I was working a full-time job in Switzerland and dreaming of more freedom…

I had no idea what I was doing. I just decided to start.

Today, I’ve built 7 Instagram accounts with over 1M followers combined, travel the world, and make a living from my phone.

One of those accounts grew to 600,000+ followers in less than 3 months using 100% AI, without ever showing my face.

If I can do it, you can too 🥰

The Faroe Islands showing itself from the best possible side!

Uno de los cenotes que más ganas tenía de conocer desde que llegué a México… y la experiencia no pudo ser más increíble. 💙✨

Tener este lugar solo para nosotros fue uno de esos momentos que se quedan grabados para siempre.

Gracias a @fonsidiventures por ser el mejor compañero y guía en cada aventura bajo el agua. 🤜🏻🤛🏻

Y gracias también a @xalocdivingcenter , porque sin ellos nada de esto habría sido posible✨

🎥 iPhone 15 + @divevolk_es 

#mexico#angelita#cenoteangelita#cenote#scuba

I had never experienced anything like it before.

My whole body was shaking, and it felt absolutely magical.

The crowd was screaming, the reef was detonating beneath one of the heaviest waves on the planet, and for a few moments everything else disappeared.

Teahupo’o had been a dream for as long as I can remember. Standing there, witnessing its power with my own eyes, was something I’ll never forget.

And to make it even more surreal, it was the biggest day I’ve ever paddled out to film from the water.

Some places exceed every expectation. Teahupo’o is one of them.

Living the dream 🥹🤍

Picking up a camera was the best thing I’ve ever done 🎥🫀

I created a Filmmaking Guide with the insights most people never share 🎥✨
(How to get clients, what to charge, grow online & how to pitch)
Comment LINK and I’ll send it to you 👇

Korea is a dream! From epic hikes to the cosiest cafes to ancient villages, there is so much to experience! The main locations in this video were seokchon lake, gamcheon village, buramsan and lastly a beautiful cafe in seongsu which is an amazing place for shopping as well! definitely coming back soon there so much more to explore beyond the main cities! if you look closely we are pinky promising with our left hand because i tore ligaments in my other pinky 😅 #travel #seoul #korea

The Ritz-Carlton Maldives, Fari Islands 📍

Incredible pool views at the Ritz-Carlton Fari Islands 🇲🇻✨ One of my favourite hotels in the Maldives

Crystal-clear turquoise water, overwater villas, private infinity pools, powder-white beaches, snorkeling with vibrant marine life, and sunsets that barely look real.

At The Ritz-Carlton Maldives, Fari Islands, true paradise is ultra-luxury, total island escape, elegant villas, and one of the world’s most breathtaking settings.

Poolside all day or straight into the ocean? 🌊☀️

#Maldives #RitzCarlton #LuxuryTravel #ocean #maldivesislands

Rediscover your city

Living in a dense city like New York, I sometimes feel like I’ve seen everything. @meta.ai helps me rediscover old spots by showing relevant local posts and reviews with directions to those places. Experience your city from a new perspective with the @meta AI app today.

Activity and location recommendations are AI-generated and Meta AI is not affiliated with any of them.

#Meta #MetaAI #NYC #Lifestyle #Ad

Japan has some of the most incredible places in the world yet people only visit tokyo, osaka and kyoto. These were shot in summer (which was perfectly fine to visit) and a lot of these places are a car ride from tokyo. The main locations are Hakone, shirakawago, matsumoto and narai juku. Many have never heard of these places yet they are still fairly well known for locals and there’s still so much to see, definitely going back soon #travel #japan #photography #tokyo

Comment “DREAM” and I’ll send you the exact strategy I used to build 7 instagram accounts from scratch to +1M followers & turn them into income ✨📱

People often say, “You’re so lucky.”, but this didn’t come from luck… For a long time, this was just a dream in the back of my mind, a quiet voice telling me I wanted more freedom, and one day, I decided to stop complaining about why my life wasn’t changing and start taking action to create my own reality ❤️‍🔥

I didn’t want to build something just for money. I wanted to build something I was truly passionate about. Something that would give me freedom. That’s how everything started.

And the best part is that this works no matter what your passion is.

Whether you’re into fitness, nutrition, travel, cooking, photography, personal development, or anything else...

If you have a passion or expertise you love talking about, you can build an Instagram account around it, create content, and turn it into income.

I’ve used this exact method across multiple topics. The topic isn’t what matters most, starting is ✨

If you’re dreaming of more freedom in your own life too, comment “DREAM” and I’ll send you my free step-by-step training directly in your DMs ✨💸😍

How much would this hotel be in your country? 😱

Imagine a hotel like this in a Western country! I think just for the view only they would already charge a couple hundred dollar per night! 💸

China is cheap! 👍🏼🇨🇳

Meaning the value for money is just excellent. We paid $35 USD per person per night to stay in this hotel in Chongqing.

The lobby is located on the 44th floor and the views are incredible.

📍 Mayiue Hotel, Chongqing, China

It is located right opposite the famous Raffles City building in central Chongqing.

#china #chinahotel #chongqing #hotel

How ironic that we run to the ocean to breathe,
while drowning in the life we’ve built on land.

The deadlines.
The expectations.
The constant feeling that we should be doing more.

But out here, none of it matters.

The waves don’t care who you are.
The ocean doesn’t ask for anything.

It simply reminds you to slow down, let go, and just exist.

And for a moment, you can finally breathe again. 🌊🤍

#travel #mind #quotes #ocean #waves

The Art of Colourgrading

Usually my colour grades are really high effort. Many of the videos you see from me are a composite of 6+ power windows (masks) to amplify certain elements of the image. For instance I use a lot of circular power windows to depict soft sun rays against a hazy atomosphere.

I am developing a colourgrading pack + resources. 

Comment LUT to learn more.

#colorgrading #davinciresolve #editing

Almost two months since my visit to Vietnam, and these frames still feel like they pause the flow of time. Vietnam left me with a feeling I had never experienced before, unfamiliar and deeply alive. I can’t wait for the next visit, to wander deeper, explore the unknown, and find the stories that have yet to be told. 

#vietnam #cinematic

This looks like an Apple ad. I made it on my phone.

No camera. No studio. No film crew. Just one photo of a product and the right prompt, run through @higgsfield.ai with Seedance 2.0.

The crazy part is it works for any product. Your phone, your shoes, your skincare, whatever you sell. Same steps every time.

What would you make an ad for first? Tell me below.

I’m trying to get better at going outside more consistently and revisiting old interests by taking photos on a camera again. It almost feels like I’m changing as much as the city is.
